content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

January 27, 2009

Eric K. Solorio
California Energy Commission
Siting, Transmission and
Environmental Protection Division
1516 Ninth Street, MS-15
Sacramento, CA 95814

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our file No. W-09-272

Dear Mr. Solorio:

This letter acknowledges your request for advice regarding the Political Reform Act (the “Act”).1 As we discussed during our telephone conversation on January 26, 2010, your situation has changed and you no longer require advice on the circumstances you outlined in your request. For this reason, we will consider your request withdrawn.

If you have other questions on this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
General Counsel

[Signature]
By: Heather M. Rowan
Counsel, Legal Division

HMR:jgl

1 The Political Reform Act is contained in Government Code Sections 81000 through 91014. All statutory references are to the Government Code, unless otherwise indicated. The regulations of the Fair Political Practices Commission are contained in Sections 18110 through 18997 of Title 2 of the California Code of Regulations. All regulatory references are to Title 2, Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations, unless otherwise indicated.
